title: Radio, Radio Everywhere | Talk Spooky to Me
summary: ⁠⁠⁠⁠Get ad-free episodes, early release, and bonus shows We celebrate two years of Talk Spooky with a military base ghost story,  the litmus test for evil, and Katy Perry's "Roar" (sort of). We also  manage to spend roughly an hour and a half talking about radio. Why?  Neither of us remember. Our musical guests on this show are The Origin, with their latest single, "I Gotta Get Outta Here" Full shownotes @ ⁠⁠⁠GhostStoryGuys.com Learn more about your ad choices. title: 8.11 - Not That Vaultsy
summary: Our heroes are on their way to change spells! Juniper (Laura Hamstra, @lauraehamstra) changed into Grandpa Warwick who now believes he’s names Vaultsy, Quinny (Tyler Hewitt, @Tyler_Hewitt) attempted to lead negotiations before he couldn’t get anyone’s names right, and Butthole (Ryan LaPlante, @theryanlaplante) prepared to negotiate with the lizardfolk. But can these heroes find the allies they need to defeat Caustilancer? Also featuring our awesome DM Tom McGee (@mcgeetd).   Enjoying Dumb-Dumbs & Dragons? - Consider becoming a Patron of Dumb-Dumbs & Dice for as little as $1 a month and gain access to a ton of extra BTS fun (https://www.patreon.com/dumbdumbdice) - Buy merch on our website (https://dumbdumbdice.com/) - Watch us on YouTube (https://youtube.com/@dumbdumbdice) - Follow us on Instagram (https://instagram.com/dumbdumbdice) - Follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/dumbdumbdice)   Artwork by the brilliant Del Borovic - Website & Portfolio (https://delborovic.com/) - X/Twitter (https://twitter.com/deltastic)

title: S1.5 Ep 13 - Gluebrick Follows Part 1
summary: Hell hath no fury...like Gluebrick in a rage. From members of Mischief Theatre, creators of the Olivier award winning ‘The Play That Goes Wrong’ and the BBC’s ‘Goes Wrong Show; comes this brand new live action role play podcast. Loosely following the rules of D&D 5e join our players as they take on the roles of four heroes attempting to escape eternal damnation in DnD Hell! title: r/MaliciousCompliance - Tried To FORCE Me Out… Got DESTROYED Instead!
summary: In today’s episode of Malicious Compliance, we’ve got four stories where smug bosses, petty neighbors, and entitled customers push too far and get exactly what they deserve. From a ruined hotel scam to a car dealership nightmare, every story ends with perfect payback. A screaming shift lead dares someone to walk out, and they do. And when a neighbor throws a tantrum over a chicken coop, things get legally brutal. Submit your own stories to KarmaStoriesPod@gmail.com. Karma Stories is available on all major Podcasting Platforms and on YouTube under the @KarmaStoriesPodcast handle. We cover stories from popular Reddit Subreddits like Entitled Parents, Tales From Tech Support, Pro Revenge and Malicious Compliance. You can find new uploads here every single day of the week! Rob's 3D Printing Site: https://Dangly3D.com Become a supporter of this podcast: https://www.spreaker.com/podcast/karma-stories--5098578/support.

title: r/MaliciousCompliance - They Mocked My Warnings… I GOT THE LAST LAUGH!
summary: Some bosses just refuse to listen and in this episode, we see exactly what happens when their arrogance backfires in spectacular fashion. From a restaurant manager ignoring critical staffing issues, to a clueless executive trying to micromanage a technical project into oblivion, these stories are all about sweet, satisfying compliance. One worker uses a doctor’s note to reclaim their rights, while another takes down a toxic colleague with a twenty-page dossier of receipts. Buckle up, this is Malicious Compliance at its most brutal and brilliant. Submit your own stories to KarmaStoriesPod@gmail.com. Sorry About The Murder is a TA2 Original Production and is recorded at TA2 Sound + Music in the Sodom and Gomorrah of Toronto, Ontario. Join our newsletter at SorryAboutTheMurder.ca for updates, discounts and exclusive goodies.  Find and support our sponsors at fableandfolly.com/partners. Learn more about your ad choices. title: The Adventure Zone Versus Robin Hood: Live in Portland!
summary: Former hero Robin Hood has been stealing from the rich-poor and giving back to the poor-rich, giving the new King of England a headache! King Mutt recruits Lady Godwin and Phileaux to stop him. With a new woodland guide to help them, can the monster hunters track down the secrets of Sherwood Forest? Additional Music in this Episode: '"Thatched Villagers" and "The Britons" by Kevin MacLeod: https://incompetech.com/. Center for Reproductive Rights: https://reproductiverights.org/
